final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire [3:0] addr,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] memory [15:0]; // 16 memory locations of 16 bits each

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory[addr] <= data_in ; // Write operation
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory[addr] ;
  end
endmodule
